commit.message:
fix: reddit scout reads full post body + longer drafts + stricter prompt

- Post body: 500 → 3000 chars (was missing half the post)
- Comments: 200 → 500 chars per comment
- Draft output: 600 → 1500 chars (was getting truncated)
- Prompt: explicit rule to read ENTIRE post, use FINAL stated specs,
  never "correct" something the poster already addressed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Comprehensive null filtering across ALL children iterations

- Filter nulls in walkPhotos forEach (gallery photo collection)
- Filter nulls in move destinations forEach
- Filter nulls in NucleusCardTree generation building
- Filter nulls in ReactFlow tree (subtreeW and place functions)
- Filter nulls in sortByBirth function (prevents sort errors)
- Ensures NO iteration over children arrays processes null values

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add KID distribution quality section with bar plot

Adds Kernel Inception Distance (KID) evaluation comparing real mocap
against Mimic-MJX, Code2Act, and ARHMM-generated rollouts. Argues that
KID complements per-trajectory reward by measuring distributional
correctness of the full behavioral repertoire.

commit.message:
chore: archive openspec change per-key-server-assignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 배포 시 캐시 자동 초기화 (수동 삭제 불필요)

- index.html에 빌드 버전 체크 스크립트 추가
- 새 버전 감지 시 서비스 워커 해제 + 캐시 전부 삭제 + 자동 리로드
- HTML은 no-cache이므로 항상 최신 스크립트 실행됨

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(routing): add per-key server assignment

Allow admins to configure which servers a sub-key can use. When servers
are assigned to a sub-key, that sub-key only uses those servers — all
other servers in the group chain are skipped. Without assignments, the
sub-key inherits all group servers (backward compatible).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 서비스 워커 새 버전 감지 시 자동 리로드

- onUpdate에서 SKIP_WAITING 후 자동 페이지 리로드
- controllerchange 이벤트로 다른 탭도 자동 갱신
- 더 이상 수동 캐시 삭제 불필요

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(outreach): force-popup allowlist for iframe-hostile submission sites

Adds ST_POPUP_ONLY_HOSTS allowlist + stGetHost/stIsPopupOnlyHost helpers
at HTML:~4177. stOpenSubmission at HTML:~4402 now branches on the host
before attempting iframe.src assignment: known iframe-hostile sites skip
the broken-frame state entirely and open in a popup window immediately.

Allowlisted hosts (decided with user after 2026-04-09 form crawl):
  - rapzilla.com        (refuses iframe; pairs with upcoming custom pane)
  - amenworldwide.com   (site under construction; kept on verified list)
  - christianraps.com   (refuses iframe, Soundcloud curator)
  - wgts919.com         (403 on automated crawl, refuses iframe)

Amen Worldwide gets a site-specific right-pane notice reassuring the user
that the outreach list is verified clean and Amen is retained because
their site is mid-rebuild — otherwise a half-loaded popup looks stale.
All other popup-only hosts share the generic "can't embed, use the popup"
copy that stOverlayOpenPopup already sets.

Matching is exact-host-or-subdomain via stGetHost (strips www. + lowercase).
Doesn't affect existing socials or non-allowlisted forms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test: comprehensive SEO & article generation E2E tests (10 cases)

Tests the full article lifecycle:
1. Article generation with enrichment questions
2. Diff-patch enrichment (fast mode)
3. Quality check (score + issues)
4. Auto-fix from quality issues
5. Generation log persistence + duplicate avoidance
6. SEO improvement scan
7. Improvement list retrieval
8. Improvement dismissal
9. Blog post save with English slug
10. Duplicate slug rejection (409)

All tests pass against production API with admin auth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(issue-37): file write and read http api and cli commands (#43)

* feat: file write/read HTTP API and CLI commands

Add POST /v1/file/write and /v1/file/read endpoints to codexd for
transferring file content via HTTP without SSH. Includes path
validation, atomic writes, base64 content encoding, and configurable
size limits. Adds codex-remote file write/read CLI commands and
new codex-remote-file skill.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: trigger re-run for flaky TestRetentionCount

Fix: Creator 병합 시 localStorage를 primary로 변경

Firestore 2초 동기화 전에 새로고침하면 구버전 Firestore 데이터가
localStorage의 최신 데이터(affiliation 등)를 덮어쓰는 버그 수정

설계 원칙(localStorage=주저장소)에 맞게 localStorage를 primary로 변경

commit.message:
feat: configurable shell for exec (--shell flag + default_shell config) (#42)

Allow selecting the shell interpreter for remote command execution
via --shell flag on exec start/run, or default_shell in codexd
config. Defaults to sh for backwards compatibility. Validates shell
exists on remote before execution.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add --full flag to exec watch for complete log output (#41)

exec watch --full streams all stdout/stderr from the beginning
instead of only tailing. Useful for debugging where intermediate
output (e.g., error tracebacks) would otherwise be truncated.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add brand evolution Phase 2 stakeholder page

HTML brand story page drawing from Diversity Wheel assets and slide examples. Covers the evolved logo, colour palette extracted from the wheel, design elements (low-poly patterns, petal photo frames, arc accents), slide examples, collateral, and next steps.

commit.message:
feat: flush stdout/stderr and set PYTHONUNBUFFERED before marking exec finished (#40)

Ensure log files are synced to disk after process exits, preventing
empty logs on fast-completing commands. Set PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 by
default to avoid Python's internal buffering hiding output.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: expand E2E tests to 74 cases across 10 test files

New test files:
- password-reset.spec.ts (7 tests): reset page, email send, code redirect, verify-recovery
- seo-improve.spec.ts (4 tests): API auth, scan auth, apply auth, page redirect
- blog.spec.ts (8 tests): listing, FS/DB articles, 404, headings, footer, category, OGP
- cases.spec.ts (7 tests): listing, cards, detail page, JobPosting schema, expertise, industries, search
- webhook-email.spec.ts (8 tests): webhook auth, no 301, invalid key, all cron auth, blog API auth
- domain-routing.spec.ts (8 tests): main/app domain routing, API no redirect, auth pages, 404

Updated existing tests to accept 429 (rate limit) alongside 401/403.

commit.message:
feat: version pill checks GitHub for app updates with yellow glow

The status bar version pill now shows the live DestinCode app version
(via app.getVersion()) and polls the GitHub Releases API every 30 minutes
for itsdestin/destincode/releases/latest. When a newer release is found,
the pill glows yellow with "Update Available" and clicking it opens the
platform-appropriate installer (.exe / .dmg / .AppImage) directly. Falls
back to opening the changelog when no update is available.

Refs #32 for native auto-update follow-up via electron-updater.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Analysis: 1주차 가설 검증 완료 및 핵심 인사이트 도출

📊 가설 검증 결과:
- 1주차 가설 검증 완료 (2026-04-10)
- 인터뷰 기반 가설 검증 매트릭스 작성
- 파일명 정리: 핵심-가설-정의 → 1주차-핵심-가설-정의

🔍 핵심 인사이트 (lessons-learned):
1. 교육-현업 단절이 핵심 페인포인트
   - 신뢰도: 85% (다수 인터뷰 일치)

2. 교육보다 컨설팅이 유효하다
   - 신뢰도: 75% (현업 요구사항)

3. 대기업 교육은 면책용이다
   - 신뢰도: 70% (숨겨진 진실)

4. 키맨 없이는 AI교육이 작동하지 않는다
   - 신뢰도: 80% (반복 관찰)

5. AI도구보다 전문성이 핵심이다
   - 신뢰도: 65% (전문가 의견)

6. DT 실패 트라우마가 AX에 전이된다
   - 신뢰도: 60% (추론 기반)

🚨 반증 시나리오:
- 교육만으로도 충분한 조직 존재 가능
- 컨설팅 없이도 자체 역량 구축 가능
- 키맨 없이도 bottom-up 혁신 가능

banners.

commit.message:
Replace blessed rendering layer with raw ANSI TUI

Migrate from blessed library to a zero-dependency ANSI escape code
renderer built on the spike from src/spike/ansi-test.ts. The new
renderer writes full frames in a single stdout call for flicker-free
rendering on the alternate screen buffer.

All existing functionality preserved: pinned header/footer, scrollable
plan content with line wrapping, active step highlighting, multi-select,
all annotation actions (comment, question, delete toggle, replace, undo),
inline annotation input, and smart approve/deny submit.

Removes blessed, ink, react, chalk, and clipboardy — zero runtime deps.

commit.message:
fix: update barcodeListingMap after em->clear() to prevent detached entities (#1459)

* fix: change default report period from current quarter to current year

The /finance/report/preview page now opens with Jan 1 — Dec 31
of the current year instead of the first day of the current quarter.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01H6xaeYn78h33QrEBcCKsaZ

* fix: default end date should be last day of current quarter, not Dec 31

Range: Jan 1 — last day of current quarter.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01H6xaeYn78h33QrEBcCKsaZ

* fix: flush new MarketplaceCostCategory immediately after persist

Prevents "Multiple non-persisted new entities" Doctrine error when
em->clear() + resetCache()/getReference() is called before the new
category is flushed to the database.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01H6xaeYn78h33QrEBcCKsaZ

* fix: pass $rawDocId into processPendingBatch closure

The closure used $rawDocId on line 236 but it was not listed in the
use() capture list, causing "Undefined variable $rawDocId" warning.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01H6xaeYn78h33QrEBcCKsaZ

* fix: update barcodeListingMap after em->clear() to prevent detached entities

After em->clear() in batch processing, barcodeListingMap held detached
MarketplaceListing entities. On next iteration, these were assigned to
new MarketplaceCost objects, causing Doctrine to report "non-persisted
new entities" on flush. Now barcodeListingMap entries are replaced with
getReference() proxies after clear, same as listingsCache.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01H6xaeYn78h33QrEBcCKsaZ

* fix: update cmake config file and add find_package integration test

After the Drogon decoupling refactoring, cpp-remote-profiler-config.cmake.in
was still referencing the old `profiler_lib` target and finding PRIVATE deps
(Backward, absl) that consumers don't need. This commit fixes the config file
to match the new target structure (profiler_core/profiler_web) and adds a CI
integration test to verify find_package correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: add add_subdirectory integration test and fix format

- Add cmake/examples/test_fetch_content/ to test add_subdirectory usage
  (simulates FetchContent consumption pattern)
- Fix clang-format issue in test_find_package/main.cpp (include order)
- Add add_subdirectory integration test step to GCC CI job
- Document discovered issue: profiler_version.h include path broken
  with add_subdirectory due to global include_directories() usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: replace outdated FetchContent examples with in-file docs

- Delete cmake/examples/{CMakeLists.txt,FetchContent_example.cmake,
  FetchContent_integration_example.cpp} which used placeholder URLs
  and deprecated singleton API (getInstance)
- Add FetchContent_Declare usage example as comments in
  test_fetch_content/CMakeLists.txt so users can see both
  add_subdirectory and FetchContent approaches in one place

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Moneyview: fix credit loss rates to DRHP values; annualise 9MFY26 NII

- Credit loss rates updated to DRHP-disclosed values:
  FY23=7.45%, FY24=7.95%, FY25=7.07%
- 9MFY26 credit loss rate computed by annualise_9m as ann. impairment/avg AUM
- annualise_9m now scales NII by 4/3 for all companies so 9MFY26 NII
  is comparable to full-year figures on trend charts
- Updated captions to reflect NII annualisation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: run prisma migrations in CI and increase e2e timeout

The presentation_mode migration was never applied to production,
causing all raffle API endpoints to return 500 errors. Added a
migration step to the deploy workflow that runs prisma migrate deploy
against the production database before deploying the server. Moved
prisma to production dependencies so it's available in the deploy
package. Also increased the e2e test timeout for raffle visibility
check to handle F1 free tier latency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
